name: LocalSend
description: Receive files from any LocalSend device on your network. Files land in SD_ROOT/LocalSend/.
author: aaronearles

changelog.v0.1.3: Rewrite as toggle pak using show2.elf for display; launch once to start receiver, launch again to stop
changelog.v0.1.2: Fix blank screen: use minui-presenter/minui-list for display (echo stdout not shown by NextUI on tg5040)
changelog.v0.1.1: Fix lockup on exit: kill background receiver when shell exits; add startup crash detection
